name: HRR_REVIEWEE_PRIOR_RATINGS
description: Talent Review Dashboard Prior Rating transaction table.

columns.Name: REVIEWEE_PRIOR_RATING_ID
columns.Comments: Unique identifier for Reviewee prior ratings.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HR_ALL_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: DASHBOARD_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRR_DASHBOARDS.DASHBOARD_ID.

columns.Name: MEETING_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to HRR_MEETINGS.MEETING_ID.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person Id information of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: PERF_RT_LVL_ID
columns.Comments: Performance rating level of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: POT_RT_LVL_ID
columns.Comments: Potential rating levell of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: RISK_LOSS_RT_LVL_ID
columns.Comments: Risk of loss rating levell of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: IMPACT_LOSS_RT_LVL_ID
columns.Comments: Impact of loss rating levell of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: TALENT_SCORE_RT_LVL_ID
columns.Comments: Talent score rating levell of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: EXTN_METRIC_VALUE1
columns.Comments: 1st Extensible rating level  of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: EXTN_METRIC_VALUE2
columns.Comments: 2nd Extensible rating level  of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: EXTN_METRIC_VALUE3
columns.Comments: 3rd Extensible rating level  of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: EXTN_METRIC_VALUE4
columns.Comments: 4th Extensible rating level  of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: EXTN_METRIC_VALUE5
columns.Comments: 5th Extensible rating level  of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: EXTN_METRIC_VALUE6
columns.Comments: 6th Extensible rating level  of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: EXTN_METRIC_VALUE7
columns.Comments: 7th Extensible rating level  of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: EXTN_METRIC_VALUE8
columns.Comments: 8th Extensible rating level  of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: EXTN_METRIC_VALUE9
columns.Comments: 9th Extensible rating level  of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: EXTN_METRIC_VALUE10
columns.Comments: 10th Extensible rating level  of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: MOBILITY_VALUE
columns.Comments: Mobility rating (no rating level) of the Reviewee.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
